test_cases.scenario: Learner can create a new account
steps: Enter name, email, and password (≥8 chars)
test_cases.expected: Account created with role='learner', user auto-signed in, redirected to /library

test_cases.scenario: Duplicate email rejected on sign up
test_cases.expected: API returns 409 with error: 'Email already in use'

test_cases.scenario: Weak password rejected on sign up
test_cases.expected: Client shows 'Password must be at least 8 characters.' error; API also returns 400 via Zod

test_cases.scenario: Learner can sign in with correct credentials
test_cases.expected: Session created, user redirected to callbackUrl (default: /library)

test_cases.scenario: Wrong credentials show error message
test_cases.expected: Error message 'Invalid email or password.' shown; no redirect

test_cases.scenario: Learner can sign out via NavBar
test_cases.expected: Session destroyed, redirected to /, NavBar shows Sign In / Get Started buttons

test_cases.scenario: Unauthenticated user cannot access /admin
test_cases.expected: Redirected to /auth/signin (middleware + layout double-check)

test_cases.scenario: Non-admin API call to /api/admin/clips returns 401
test_cases.expected: Response: 401 { error: 'Unauthorized' }

test_cases.scenario: NavBar shows correct UI based on auth state
steps: Visit any page unauthenticated — observe NavBar
test_cases.expected: Unauthenticated: 'Sign in' link + 'Get Started' button. Authenticated: avatar initials button with dropdown (name, role, sign out, Admin link if admin).

test_cases.scenario: create-admin.ts creates/upserts admin user
steps: Set ADMIN_EMAIL and ADMIN_PASSWORD env vars
test_cases.expected: User created with role='admin'; if exists, role and passwordHash updated

test_cases.scenario: Admin sees stats dashboard
test_cases.expected: Dashboard shows total clips, learner count, completed session count. Quick action buttons: Add Clip, View Users.

test_cases.scenario: Admin can browse and search clips
test_cases.expected: Clips listed with thumbnail, movie title, skill, difficulty, active status. Search filters by title and skill. Pagination for >20 clips.

test_cases.scenario: Admin can create a new clip
steps: Fill in all required fields (YouTube ID, movie title, scene description, annotation, startSec, endSec)
test_cases.expected: POST /api/admin/clips creates clip in DB; user redirected to /admin/clips; new clip appears in list

test_cases.scenario: Admin can edit an existing clip
steps: Click edit (pencil) icon on a clip in /admin/clips
test_cases.expected: PUT /api/admin/clips/[id] updates clip; redirected to /admin/clips

test_cases.scenario: Admin can delete a clip with confirmation
steps: Click delete (trash) icon on a clip in /admin/clips
test_cases.expected: DELETE /api/admin/clips/[id] removes clip; clip disappears from list immediately

test_cases.scenario: Admin can view all registered learners
test_cases.expected: Table shows name, email, role, joined date, session count. Learners have 'Promote' button, admins have 'Demote' button.

test_cases.scenario: Admin can promote/demote user roles
test_cases.expected: PATCH /api/admin/users updates role to 'admin'; badge in table updates immediately

test_cases.scenario: Admin can view individual learner session history
test_cases.expected: User detail shows name, email, role, join date, total sessions, session history table with movie, skill, status, score, date.

test_cases.scenario: Non-admin learner cannot access /admin
test_cases.expected: Redirected to /auth/signin (middleware fires, layout double-checks)

test_cases.scenario: API routes return 401 for non-admin learner
test_cases.expected: Both return 401 { error: 'Unauthorized' }
